query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a person shown in profile standing before a brightly lit rectangular window set in a concrete block wall. The figure appears as a dark silhouette against the illumination, with the head bowed and shoulders slightly hunched. The vast majority of the frame is occupied by deep black shadow. The wall surrounding the window shows visible mortar lines, scattered dark spots, and a diagonal crack running across the window pane.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A stark black and white photograph that employs extreme exposure, rendering a person as a near-total silhouette against a brightly lit rectangular window while the rest of the scene is swallowed by crushing, impenetrable black shadow. The bowed head and hunched posture of the figure, set against a cracked window pane and rough concrete wall, combine with the suffocating darkness to evoke a mood of dread, isolation, and atmospheric unease.
